---
title: "ZS-2525-bit.github.io"
image: media/headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samanthacsik/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ZS-25-bit
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:scsik@ucsb.edu





---
this is my website
